intent_cluster_representatives.0: The intent is to sarcastically criticize Modi by suggesting he was responsible for the spread of COVID-19 instead of Tablighi Jamaat.
intent_cluster_representatives.1: To discredit and undermine the legitimacy of the farmer protests.
intent_cluster_representatives.2: To blame China for the origin and spread of the coronavirus.
intent_cluster_representatives.3: To criticize biased media coverage of the coronavirus spread.
intent_cluster_representatives.4: To portray Muslims and religion in general as threats due to their influence on individuals.
intent_cluster_representatives.5: To criticize Kajri Lal for allegedly contributing to the spread of COVID-19.
intent_cluster_representatives.6: The intent is to criticize the Chinese government and portray China as a threat to global peace.
intent_cluster_representatives.7: To question and potentially blame Tablighi Jamaat for the spread of COVID-19 in India.

implication_cluster_representatives.0: Spread negative sentiment about China and its people, potentially fostering prejudice against Chinese individuals.
implication_cluster_representatives.1: This statement may provoke anti-Tablighi sentiment and contribute to communal bias.
implication_cluster_representatives.2: This statement could incite anti-Muslim sentiment and hostility.
implication_cluster_representatives.3: Promotes hostility toward media figures, encourages vulgar discourse, and intensifies communal and political tensions around COVID-19 narratives.
implication_cluster_representatives.4: This statement undermines the credibility of the protest and dismisses the protesters' concerns.
implication_cluster_representatives.5: This comment could promote negative perceptions and fuel communal tensions against Tablighi Jamaat.
implication_cluster_representatives.6: This statement could incite distrust towards Modi and his government, potentially sowing further political division and skepticism about public health narratives.
implication_cluster_representatives.7: This statement may portray Kejriwal as biased, potentially alienating his supporters and damaging his reputation.
